mapper.select: SELECT * FROM column_info WHERE datasource_id = #{datasourceId} AND LOWER(table_name) = LOWER(#{tableName}) ORDER BY update_time DESC, create_time DESC, id DESC

SELECT * FROM column_info WHERE datasource_id = #{datasourceId} AND LOWER(table_name) = LOWER(#{tableName}) AND LOWER(column_name) = LOWER(#{columnName}) ORDER BY update_time DESC, create_time DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM column_info WHERE datasource_id = #{datasourceId} AND LOWER(table_name) = LOWER(#{tableName}) AND LOWER(column_name) = LOWER(#{columnName})
